name: Kids' Softside Carry On Spinner Suitcase Cars - Cat & Jack™️
description:
Your child will stay organized during vacation with this Cars Softside Carry-On Spinner Suitcase from Cat & Jack™. This carry-on spinner suitcase features a softside design with a zipper closure to keep their belongings secured while traveling. It's designed with a lined interior organizer with cross straps and two large zip mesh pockets that offer plenty of storage space. An exterior zip pocket comes in handy for stashing extra stuff, while a water bottle pocket allows for hands-free carrying of their water bottle. Plus, the spinner wheels and the telescopic metal handle allow for smooth maneuvering, while the side handle makes carrying by hand easy. It's finished with allover colorful car prints on a green backdrop to excite your young car enthusiast.

Cat & Jack™: Designed for all children so you can trust it's made for yours.
